title: Utopia Towels - Premium Jumbo Bath Sheet (90 x 180 cm, 2 Pack) - 100% Ring Spun Cotton Highly Absorbent and Quick Dry Extra Large Bath Sheet - Super Soft Hotel Quality Towel (Grey)
features: Set Includes - 2 luxury cotton bath sheets measuring 90 by 180 cm each
Premium Quality - Our bath towels are manufactured with premium quality 100% ring spun cotton making them elegant yet functional.
Luxurious And Functional – The bath sheets are designed to give out luxurious experience while ideally fulfilling needs in general cleaning or washing.
Soft And Absorbent – Our bathroom towels feel soft and delicate on the skin while the composition enables them to be highly absorbent and durable.
Organic Composition – The material used in the manufacturing of the large bath towel is natural and organic making it completely safe and reliable for use.
description: Product Description Merging Class with Style, For a Rejuvenated You Amp up your comfort and spa-like aura, by indulging in the luxury you deserve and relax in style with the extravagant bath sheets, that provides a magical, supple feel to your skin. The large bath towels is an essential, for your chic style! Fashioned for You and Your Family! The Plush nature of the towel makes it comfy and chilled and takes you on the voyage of peace and harmony. The large bath sheets hemmed to give a splendid finish while maintaining its durability. Our bath towel is ultra-plush, highly absorbent, and exceedingly functional and durable. Magnificent Splurge of Deluxe Vibes The premium quality of the extra-large bath towel, sized at 90 x 180 cm ensures maximum absorption as it is denser but lighter in weight. Enjoy the complacent feel after a long relaxing shower, while lounging at the beach, sunbathing at the poolside, or relishing at the spa. Easy Care Guide ·Ideal Washing Temperature: Wash the towels at around 30 degrees to preserve them for a long time and keep them soft. · Wash Separately: Wash the bath sheets separately & dry them immediately to minimize lint. · Do not bleach: Avoid using bleach, fabric softener, chemical, or iron large bath towels. Décor at the Edge of luxury To make it useful yet stunning with alluring shades, and sumptuous textures; select the colour of your choice from the personalized plethora of vibrant colours. Classically hemmed and stitched bath sheets best to be used at home, hotels, sanatoriums, and fitness centres. Quality Manufacturing Transform your bathroom into a chic haven, with the perfect accessory. A variety of large bath towels, fabricated exclusively for you. Bath At Ease The generously large bath towel comfortably wraps around your body while efficiently absorbing all the moisture. Relish in the sun Lounge on the beach, by the pool, on the deck at the lake, or in the open bow of a boat and indulge in good times. Plush & Stylish Bath Sheets The oversized big bath towel gives a splendid ending to your gratifying water encounters.
